author: Авакумов Данил Эдуардович
objective: Define the first scientific package of the rebooted BDC research line: a selection-physics rebuild experiment that tests new resource and energy regimes before any new organism-level expansion.
research_question: Can BDC define a first reboot experiment that tests new selection physics honestly and prevents premature return to organism-level complexity?

execution_rules.phase_gate: May start only after the reboot charter is approved.

tests_required: experiment doc includes protocol and roadmap impact sections
package states pass/fail condition for Phase R1
out_of_scope: selection of a winning regime before data
